DISMISSAL ORDER RETURNED UNDELIVERED SENT TO DEFT.
CONTINUE ORDER RETURNED UNDELIVERED "MAILBOX CLOSED" SENT TO DEFENDANT.

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF DEC-10-2010 - CONTINUED FOR PROOF OF SERVICE TO JAN-21-2011 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT. 506. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF. JUDGE PRO TEM: RICHARD GROTCH. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506)
REMARK: FILE IS DESTROYED PURSUANT TO GOVERNMENT CODE SECTION 68153. ORDER SIGNED AND FILED ON MAY-26-2026.
THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITH PREJUDICE. NO APPEARANCES BY BOTH PARTIES. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: M. DE LUNA. NOTHING REPORTED. (506)
